headline: Ulta doubled store fulfillment capabilities in 2025
summary: The beauty retailer grew its ship-from-store program to 1,000 stores in fiscal year 2025, while its fulfillment center footprint remained flat compared to 2024.

headline: Stocks, sectors, and charts this strategist is watching
summary: Marketgauge.com chief strategist Michele Schneider chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about stocks and sectors she's keeping a close eye on.
